name: Biscayan Basque (Bizkaiera)
notes: Biscayan (Bizkaiera/Bizkaia). Western Basque dialect. Key features: sibilant palatalization after /i/ ([s̺,s̻] → [ʃ]), loss of aspiration /h/, tendency toward unstressed /a/ raising, some sibilant pair mergers. Morphologically most divergent from Batua (unique verb auxiliaries, case forms).
